7:
WITH yearly AS (
  SELECT c.Segment,
         substr(ym.Date,1,4) AS yr,
         SUM(ym.Consumption) AS cons
  FROM yearmonth ym
  JOIN customers c ON ym.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
  WHERE (ym.Date LIKE '2012%' OR ym.Date LIKE '2013%')
    AND c.Currency = 'EUR'
  GROUP BY c.Segment, substr(ym.Date,1,4)
), inc AS (
  SELECT
    Segment,
    SUM(CASE WHEN yr='2012' THEN cons END) AS cons_2012,
    SUM(CASE WHEN yr='2013' THEN cons END) AS cons_2013,
    (SUM(CASE WHEN yr='2013' THEN cons END) - SUM(CASE WHEN yr='2012' THEN cons END))
      / NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN yr='2012' THEN cons END),0) * 100.0 AS pct_inc
  FROM yearly
  GROUP BY Segment
)
SELECT Segment AS answer
FROM inc
ORDER BY pct_inc DESC
LIMIT 1
UNION ALL
SELECT Segment
FROM inc
ORDER BY pct_inc ASC
LIMIT 1;	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing

143:
SELECT player_name
FROM (
    WITH extremes AS (
        SELECT MAX(height) AS max_h, MIN(height) AS min_h FROM Player
    ),
    tallest AS (
        SELECT p.player_api_id, p.player_name
        FROM Player p, extremes e
        WHERE p.height = e.max_h
    ),
    shortest AS (
        SELECT p.player_api_id, p.player_name
        FROM Player p, extremes e
        WHERE p.height = e.min_h
    ),
    avg_finishing AS (
        SELECT player_api_id, AVG(finishing) AS avg_finishing
        FROM Player_Attributes
        GROUP BY player_api_id
    ),
    combined AS (
        SELECT tf.player_name, af.avg_finishing
        FROM tallest tf
        JOIN avg_finishing af ON tf.player_api_id = af.player_api_id
        UNION ALL
        SELECT sh.player_name, af.avg_finishing
        FROM shortest sh
        JOIN avg_finishing af ON sh.player_api_id = af.player_api_id
    )
    SELECT player_name
    FROM combined
    ORDER BY avg_finishing DESC
    LIMIT 1
) LIMIT 1;	----- bird -----	european_football_2
